name: quest-reminder
description: QuestLog - 異界冒険記録 (Otherworld Adventure Record)

scripts.build: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force dist | Out-Null; Copy-Item index.html dist/index.html -Force; Copy-Item manifest.json dist/manifest.json -Force; Copy-Item sw.js dist/sw.js -Force; Write-Host 'Build complete'"

author: kuroiro4696siro-cyber
